posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Make the current card layout a vertical list so that it’s easily scannable.

It’s just 2 CSS changes:

Before:

Screenshot 2025-06-02 at 12.56.411802×1006 145 KB

After:

Screenshot 2025-06-02 at 12.57.041798×1034 188 KB

  • This should really be done in the automation center too, so that things are easier to find for users.
  • Each should have a text search ability at the top, so that you can find recipes based on text matching.
  • Oh, and really look at fixing the terrible mess that is reordering integration recipes. That’s just wild.

Thank you!

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding categories or groups in automation would also be great.

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
